$comment: ARG-048 (Cycle 5) seeded the canonical map from sandbox image profile to the tool_ids the image provisions (i.e. installs and exposes on PATH). ARG-049 (Cycle 5 capstone) added contract C16 (image-coverage-completeness) which fails CI when ANY tool_id from backend/config/tools/*.yaml is missing from at least one profile here. As of ARG-049 close every one of the 157 descriptors maps to >=1 of the 6 sandbox images. The YAML descriptor side of the relationship (the image: field) is verified separately by contract C9 (image-label-allowed). Profiles list the tool_ids ASCII-sorted so the file is byte-stable across Git diffs. ARG-058 (Cycle 6) closed the network-tool YAML migration: the 16 dual-listed tools (bloodhound_python, crackmapexec, evil_winrm, ike_scan, impacket_examples, impacket_secretsdump, kerbrute, ldapsearch, mongodb_probe, ntlmrelayx, onesixtyone, redis_cli_probe, responder, smbclient, snmp_check, snmpwalk) now live exclusively in argus-kali-network — argus-kali-web shrunk from 91 -> 75 entries and dual-listed tool count is 0.
generated_by: ARG-048 + ARG-049 + ARG-058 (manual seeding + capstone C16 closure + network-tool YAML migration cleanup, sourced from backend/config/tools/*.yaml + docs/sandbox-images.md)

argus-kali-binary.purpose: Binary / mobile / firmware analysis (Backlog/dev1_md §4.18). Currently NOT yet built — descriptors fall back to argus-kali-full at runtime via the image_resolver alias rule.

argus-kali-browser.purpose: Browser automation, headless DAST helpers, CSP / cookie / CORS probes (Backlog/dev1_md §4.19).

argus-kali-cloud.purpose: Cloud audit, IaC / SAST / SCA, container scanning, hash crackers (Backlog/dev1_md §4.13 + §4.15 + §4.16).

argus-kali-network.purpose: Network-protocol exploitation: SNMP / LDAP / SMB / IKE / impacket / Kerberos / NoSQL probes / BloodHound (Backlog/dev1_md §4.17). ARG-048 NEW profile. ARG-058 (Cycle 6) completed the migration of all 16 dual-listed tools from argus-kali-web (impacket_*, snmpwalk, ldapsearch, smbclient, responder, ike_scan, kerbrute, crackmapexec, evil_winrm, mongodb_probe, redis_cli_probe, ntlmrelayx, bloodhound_python, snmp_check, onesixtyone) so they now live exclusively in this image.

argus-kali-recon.purpose: Passive + active reconnaissance: subdomain enumeration, OSINT, port scanning, SMB / RPC / LDAP enumeration (Backlog/dev1_md §4.1 + §4.2). ARG-048 NEW profile.

argus-kali-web.purpose: Web-application testing: HTTP fingerprinting, content discovery, crawlers, CMS / web-VA / SQLi / XSS / SSRF / OAST / auth / API (Backlog/dev1_md §4.4 — §4.14). The largest profile by tool count; ARG-058 (Cycle 6) shrunk it from 91 -> 75 entries by migrating the 16 dual-listed network-protocol tools to argus-kali-network.
